what_was_requested: ETAP 3: Volatility Term Structure Spread — validate, publish cf_vol_term_spread custom feature, clone baseline strategy, integrate vol regime filter, backtest, and compare against baseline
what_was_done: 1. Validated cf_vol_term_spread custom feature (ratio of 12-period to 96-period rolling return std minus 1) using compute_series(ctx) entrypoint. 2. Published feature to registry. 3. Built managed feature dataset with cf_vol_term_spread column (54,864 rows). 4. Cloned active-signal-v1 to candidate_vol_term_spread_v1. 5. Saved version 2 with cf_vol_term_spread > -0.2 regime filter on both long and short signals. 6. Passed preflight (backtests_plan) with feature shift audit warning (lead retain ratio 1.19 — potential same-bar leakage). 7. Ran full-history backtest (2021-03-24 to 2026-03-20). 8. Compared against baseline run 20260407-194505-36c2a53d. 9. Recorded results in research memory. 10. Added snapshot to Gold Collection.
